post.title: Typescript React Native with Jest
post.description: Still going down the Typescript conversion of React Native Bluetooth Classic it was time to get the library setup with actual unit testing.  Follow along with another few days of failures and successes.
post.excerpt: So I've been slowly converting react-native-bluetooth-classic to Typescript, which went off fairly well, and decided it would be a good idea…
